understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+') simultaneously within a limited number of steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is done via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN actions which move the currently selected piece. Clicking a coordinate switches selection to another piece if one exists there. Pieces can be blocked by walls or other obstacles, preventing movement, and clicking on empty or blocked coordinates fails to move/select anything.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked '+') simultaneously within a limited number of steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is done via MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN actions which move the currently selected piece. Clicking a coordinate switches selection to another piece if one exists there. Pieces can be blocked by walls or other obstacles, preventing movement, and clicking on empty or blocked coordinates fails to move/select anything.
